channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: High energy lights on 24/7 on council block, 25th May
item.description:
I don't know when it started, but for at least 1 month I've noticed the lights on the exterior of Dunnock Court are on. They are beaming day and night, costing the residents money along with wasting energy. I think the day/night sensor is probably broken so they never switch off.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmworth Grove, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can't get down path due to overgrown trees, 25th May
item.description:
There are a number of overgrown trees blocking the pavement on this road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leyland Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish not collected on time, 25th May
item.description:
Rubbish not collected on time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London

item.title: General rubbish in Hayles St, Brook Drive end, 25th May
item.description:
Same old, same old.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Hayles Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Overflowing bins and flytippng, 25th May
item.description:
Bins need collecting more regularly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Disgusting rubbish in Hayles St near Hedger St., 25th May
item.description:
Same old, same old. Almost daily flytipping here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Hayles Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Tree needs pruning as it scrapes on cars, 25th May
item.description:
Tree needs pruning as it scrapes on cars As it overhangs the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shaftesbury Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Obstructed path, 25th May
item.description:
Due to overgrown hedges bushes trees in Number 53 Mount Pleasant Road the footpath is becoming unpassable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Pleasant Road, West Green, Greater London

item.description:

item.title: Fly tipping- daily., 25th May

Dumped rubbish and garden stuff

item.title: Broken clothes stand in Lamlash St Garden, 25th May
item.description:
Usual flytipping spot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St George's Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Overgrown trees on bridge, 25th May
item.description:
The trees in the middle of the bridge are overgrown and totally covered the bridge making it difficult to walk down the golders green side of the bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Golders Green Road, Brent Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willesden Lane/Ladbrokes - Graffiti, 25th May
item.description:
Willesden Lane/Ladbrokes - Graffiti
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin too small, 25th May
item.description:
I have reported this same matter twice before The bin regularly overflows and contents are dragged onto the street and into our property by wildlife. You clear the bin but the overall problem isn't fixed and won't be until you replace the bin with a larger one with a cover as has been requested

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Antisocial aggressive behaviour, public alcohol drinking and urinating, 25th May
item.description:
A group of men drinking around the main memorial park bench, urinating and shouting, acting aggressively. Ongoing from 9pm.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car blocking footpath to charge car, 25th May
item.description:
A car has mounted and parked their car on a footpath to gain access to an electric charger.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farquhar Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter after street parties, 25th May
item.description:
Lots of men hang outside Bradstock road off licence everyday smoking and doing drugs- leaving all their rubbish behind them and causing disruptions to everybody living on the estate. This has been on going for years.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bradstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 Boxes of Gas Cylinders, 25th May
item.description:
Location: Darenth Road not far from Wickham Street junction Two boxes of 6 gas cylinders..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darenth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer dumped in Mercers Close., 25th May
item.description:
I was deliberately left blocking entry to back gate. Noticed it yesterday.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mercers Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping opposite unsightly graffiti, 25th May
item.description:
Please remove the fly tipping which has been placed under a tree on the opposite side of the Street from the previous previously reported fly tipping and graffiti. As previously stated the graffiti makes the neighbourhood come down in demeanour and therefore encourages this kind of fly tipping more frequently. This is a conservation zone and should be treated and respected as such the Council needs to be on top of this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Coin Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
